Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change This Classification Of This Action From "Complex" To "Not Complex"
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ERIK BATOOG's Motion To Change This Classification Of This Action From "Complex" To "Not Complex" is Granted. No opposition filed. The case is not complex and the parties shall recover whatever complex fees they actually paid to the court. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L.
